UserConfig.title: User Configuration
UserConfig.description: Configuration for a user's digital avatar including videos, knowledge base, and contact info.

welcomeVideo.description: URL for the welcome entry video (MP4)

talkingVideo.description: URL for the talking animation video (MP4)

idleVideo.description: URL for the idle animation video (MP4)

knowledgeBase.description: System prompt/instructions for the Gemini AI model

avatarName.description: The displayed name of the digital分身

avatarTitle.description: The displayed job title of the digital分身

avatarPhone.description: The contact phone number of the digital分身

avatarEmail.description: The contact email address of the digital分身

updatedAt.description: The last time this configuration was updated

configs/{userId}.description: Stores individual user configurations for their digital avatar showroom.
